# ECB LLC

> ECB LLC is a physical commodities trading company focused on Latin America. It originates and trades metals, minerals and fertilizers, and advises on M&A (mergers and acquisitions) of strategic mining assets — concessions, projects and operating mines — connecting international capital, particularly from Asia, with opportunities in the region.

ECB LLC operates on both sides of the physical market (buying and selling), with origination, international logistics, compliance (KYC/AML, independent SGS-type inspection) and deal structuring. The website is informational only and does not process transactions; every deal is closed directly and bilaterally.

## Core business
- Physical commodities trading (buy & sell) across Latin America and global markets
- Mining M&A advisory: origination of mining assets, due diligence, transaction structuring, connection to international capital and offtake agreements
- Coverage: Latin America (origination) · Asia, Europe, Americas (demand)

## Products
- Base metals: copper (Grade A cathodes, concentrate), zinc (SHG, concentrate), lead (concentrate, ingot), tin (concentrate, refined)
- Precious metals: gold (doré, bars), silver (bars, concentrate by-product)
- Minerals & bulk: iron ore (fines, lump), manganese ore, lithium (spodumene concentrate, carbonate), bauxite
- Fertilizers: urea (46% N), MAP, DAP

## Languages
Spanish (default), Portuguese, English, Chinese (简体中文). Chinese page: https://ecb-llc.com/zh/ — 拉丁美洲矿业并购（M&A）与实物大宗商品贸易。

## Pages
- Spanish (default): https://ecb-llc.com/
- English: https://ecb-llc.com/en/
- Portuguese: https://ecb-llc.com/pt/
- Chinese (中文): https://ecb-llc.com/zh/

## Contact
- Email: contact@ecb-llc.com
- Nature: B2B only. Informational website, not a buy/sell channel.
